segments.text: Suresh sir, thank you for being on a hold, I appreciate your patience. Sorry for the long hold. Now, doctor is on call. Doctor please.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Hello, good morning. Doctor Taskeem speaking from Tata AIA Life Insurance. Am I speaking to Shreyas R?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: This call was regarding your medical interview, so is it the right time to speak to you?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Shall I continue in English or Hindi?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: So, kindly note that this call is being recorded by the company for the quality and audit purpose.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: We have received your insurance proposal, and for further processing, we'll be requiring to do a telephonic medical verification in which we'll be asking your medical and verification details.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: The questions will be on the basis of your insurance application form and this recorded call will take around 10 to 12 minutes.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: So, can I continue with the call?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: The information provided by you about your health and habits will form the part of your insurance application form, and if the proposal gets accepted, then there will be a legal contract of insurance formed between you and Tata AIA Life Insurance.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Any wrong information or missing information can affect the policy, or your policy may get terminated or rejected, and your claims may get rejected.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: So, please answer thoughtfully and claims may get rejected before or after the issuance of the policy. So, please answer thoughtfully and correct, okay?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: So, your details are in front of me, so your full name is Shreyas R, correct?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Are you on job or self-employed?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: ID proof, what have you submitted as an ID proof for yourself? Aadhaar, PAN?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: So, please give last four digits of your Aadhaar.
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: And where are you located now?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay, I'll be asking you few health related questions. All questions are mandatory, you can answer in yes or no, okay?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Have you previously or currently or in the last two years or currently consuming cigarette, bidi, paan, gutkha, tobacco or nicotine in any form?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Any time doctor has advised you to stop or reduce the consumption of alcohol?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Uh, I have not consumed alcohol.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Narcotics, have you ever used narcotics or recreational drugs which has not been prescribed by a licensed physician?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay, now I'll be asking you few health, okay. Have you ever been diagnosed or taken treatment for low or high blood pressure, high cholesterol, triglycerides or lipids?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Chest pain, chest heaviness, chest discomfort, heart murmur, heart attack, heart valve disorder, coronary artery disease, congenital heart disease, rheumatic fever, palpitation, shortness of breath or any other heart related complaint?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Cancer or pre-cancerous condition, leukemia, enlarged nodes, unusual skin lesions, dysplasia, leukoplakia, sarcoma, tumor, polyps, cysts, nodules, lumps or any type of growth?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Diabetes or sugar in blood or urine, hyperthyroidism, hypothyroidism or any other thyroid or endocrine disorder?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Asthma, bronchitis, sinusitis, tuberculosis, pneumonia, chronic or recurrent of emphysema, chronic pulmonary disease or any other respiratory complaint?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Hepatitis, hepatitis carrier, fatty liver, liver cirrhosis, jaundice, alcoholic liver disease or liver complaint?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Anemia, thalassemia, SLE, blood or autoimmune disorders?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Anxiety, depression, fits, paralysis, stroke, transient ischemic attacks, Parkinson's, multiple sclerosis, dementia, Alzheimer's or any other neurological, nervous or mental health problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Gastritis, gastroesophageal reflux, irritable bowel syndrome, recurrent indigestion, stomach ulcer, oesophagitis, Barrett's oesophagus, ulcerative colitis, Crohn's disease or any other pancreas or gastrointestinal complaints?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Kidney or gallbladder stones, kidney or urinary tract infection, kidney or urinary tract, kidney or gallbladder stones, kidney or urinary tract infection, blood or protein in urine, chronic kidney disease, kidney failure, piles, fistula, hernia, hydrocele or any other kidney, genital urinary bladder, prostate or urinary system problems?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Recurrent backache, arthritis, gout, slip disc, muscular deformities, physical disability or any other muscle, bone, joint, limbs or spine problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Any history of any blindness, blindness, cataract, glaucoma, impaired vision, double vision or eye complaint?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Right now, I have uh, short sightedness.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay, short sightedness, so you can't see far distant things, correct?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Deafness, impaired hearing, difficulty in speech, difficulty in swallowing, hoarseness of voice, discharge from ears or any other ear, nose, throat problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Hello, deafness, impaired hearing, difficulty in speech, difficulty in swallowing, hoarseness of voice, discharge from ears or any other ear, nose, throat problem?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Anything else that you would like to share with us with regarding to your health or habits?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Okay. Any abnormal findings in any of the investigations done like blood, urine, X-ray, ECG, CT scan, MRI scan, endoscopy, colonoscopy, biopsy, treadmill test?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Uh, no, ma'am, I've not undergone any test like this.
segments.speaker: customer

segments.text: Okay. And any treatment done for more than two weeks or you have been advised to take a specialist opinion or refer to a hospital or been advised any test like blood, urine, X-ray, ECG, CT scan, MRI scan?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Any genetic or hereditary disorders like cerebral palsy, Down syndrome or poliomyelitis?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Any inability to perform your daily activities or you have been absent from work for more than two consecutive weeks?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Have you ever been advised to take test, treatment or counseling for HIV AIDS or sexually transmitted disease?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: Apart from whatever you have informed, have you ever had any unexplained weight loss or weight gain, or waiting to take a medical advice or a surgical procedure?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: So, you hereby declare that the information given by you are complete and true and it will form the basis for the policy record, okay?
segments.speaker: doctor

segments.text: So, I'll send the case to Tata AIA Life Insurance for further processing. Thank you.
segments.speaker: doctor
